finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_01.md:277, chapters/chapter_01.md:299, chapters/chapter_01.md:311, chapters/chapter_01.md:319, chapters/chapter_01.md:483, chapters/chapter_01.md:523
finding_results.notes: The chapter now turns on ship-specific information in the noodles scene: Mama Yun's refrigeration clue plus Ed's service-record read change the crew's working theory from simple parking theft to a disguised freight-cold vessel, and Jet responds with a concrete no-touch rule plus targeted investigation. The paid-dock scene then follows that lead into a more specific repair-supply plan before the deeper signal anomaly lands.
finding_results.summary: Replaced the repetitive Deimos relitigation with a middle escalation where the crew learns the occupying ship is masking freight-cold hardware under pleasure-boat paperwork, changes its plan, and narrows tomorrow's investigation before Ed's final call.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_01.md:79, chapters/chapter_01.md:235, chapters/chapter_01.md:237, chapters/chapter_01.md:371, chapters/chapter_01.md:373, chapters/chapter_01.md:417
finding_results.notes: Revised four of the five cited Faye lines plus two dependent echo lines from Jet and Spike. The fifth cited line ('menaced by parking,' snapshot line 357) was already removed by a prior revision pass. Line 79: 'emotional association' replaced with hustler-register honest claim of unpaid entitlement ('I haven't paid shit for that spot and I still want it back.'). Line 235: 'material commitment' replaced with concrete dark humor about food substance ('Dinner's supposed to have something dead in it.'). Line 237: Jet's echo revised to match new concrete phrasing ('You want something dead, go marry a butcher.'). Line 371: 'Emotionally it's mine' replaced with maximally colloquial playground claim ('I called it. Dibs.'). Line 373: Spike's echo revised to match ('You've called dibs on everything tonight.'). Line 417: narrated 'insulted the concept of beef' replaced with colloquial 'with no damn beef in them.' All revised punchlines avoid the forbidden abstract words (association, commitment, menaced, emotionally) and land through colloquial attack, dark humor, or hustler-register entitlement consistent with Faye's style-bible profile (high contraction level, high profanity, gambling/debt/money lexical signature). A cold reader could attribute each revised line to Faye without narration cues.

finding_results.evidence: Added Jet-close interior beats through both dialogue-heavy runs at chapters/chapter_01.md:241, chapters/chapter_01.md:253, chapters/chapter_01.md:271, chapters/chapter_01.md:289, chapters/chapter_01.md:305, chapters/chapter_01.md:329, chapters/chapter_01.md:341, chapters/chapter_01.md:467, chapters/chapter_01.md:485, chapters/chapter_01.md:503, chapters/chapter_01.md:521, chapters/chapter_01.md:539, and chapters/chapter_01.md:551.
finding_results.notes: The noodles and paid-dock conversations now stay anchored in Jet's bodily reaction, private judgment, and self-reproach rather than reading as external transcript coverage.
finding_results.summary: Inserted recurring Jet interiority across both long dialogue runs so the chapter holds close-third POV cadence all the way through the ship dispute.

finding_results.evidence: Varied the cited negation-driven passages at chapters/chapter_01.md:5, chapters/chapter_01.md:181, chapters/chapter_01.md:315, chapters/chapter_01.md:449, and chapters/chapter_01.md:555, while preserving only the strongest arrival-description stack at chapters/chapter_01.md:35.
finding_results.notes: The repeated No/Not fragment habit has been broken into different sentence shapes, images, and list syntax so the chapter keeps pressure without sounding metronomic.
finding_results.summary: Reduced the recurring No/Not fragment-stack tic to a single deliberate descriptive passage and redistributed emphasis through more varied syntax elsewhere.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 1 now contains a clear pre-ending turn driven by new information about the occupying ship: the crew revises its understanding of the vessel, adopts a concrete immediate rule and next-step plan, and arrives at Ed's final anomaly from an already-escalated investigation rather than from static complaint.

Single finding addressed: Faye's dialogue diction was abstract and writerly in five cited locations, using composed-for-the-page vocabulary ('emotional association,' 'material commitment,' 'Emotionally,' 'menaced') that broke her hustler idiolect. Revised four lines (the fifth was already removed by prior revision) to replace abstract phrasing with concrete, colloquial, body-and-money-grounded language. Also revised two echo lines (Jet and Spike) whose phrasing depended on the now-removed abstractions. No structural changes; all revisions are local dialogue-register fixes preserving scene architecture, leverage shifts, and chapter continuity.

Revised chapter_01 in place for the prose/copyedit pass by restoring regular Jet interiority through the two transcript-prone dialogue runs and by varying the chapter's repeated No/Not emphasis patterns without softening the chapter's comic-pressure register.
